name: Property and Fuzz Tests

tasks.title: Audit
tasks.description: Verify all work in Property and Fuzz Tests is complete and correct

scope: Two new test additions: (1) Property-based test for FindNextTask verifying it always returns an actionable task (not blocked, not complete, not audit when non-audit work remains). Use random tree generation similar to propagation_property_test.go. (2) Fuzz test for scanTerminalMarker verifying it handles adversarial input without panicking -- model output is untrusted input.
success_criteria: FindNextTask property test passes 500+ random cases with all navigation invariants verified
Fuzz tests for scanTerminalMarker and extractAssistantText run for 30s each without panics
All tests integrate into existing test suites (go test ./internal/state/ and go test ./internal/daemon/)

breadcrumbs.text: Created 2 children: findnexttask-property-test (leaf, 2 tasks: invariant spec then implementation), scanterminalmarker-fuzz-test (leaf, 2 tasks: scanTerminalMarker fuzz and extractAssistantText fuzz). Ordering: spec precedes implementation for FindNextTask; fuzz tasks are independent and parallelizable. Both leaves can proceed concurrently.
